employer.title: Employer Card & Immigration

employer.oamp.desc: Department of Asylum and Migration Policy — biometrics & card collection
employer.foreign.desc: For residence registration within 3 working days after arrival
employer.important: The Employee Card is your legal document for living and working in Czech Republic. It combines a work permit and residence permit into one card.
employer.help.desc: If you have any questions about your Employee Card renewal, address change, or immigration status, contact your coordinator.
